So, like, just show them the velocity that your competitors are investing X amount of money in organic, because this is the dollar value of the organic traffic they're getting.
And this is how it's accelerating over time when they're building a compounding advantage.
So that frames it in a way where they feel for more left out.
So that helps.

500 keywords here, and there's a total search volume of 500k, whatever, we're effectively starting to capture maybe 100k of that.

So unless you frame it against their competition, they're always going to think that, hey, these numbers don't look good.
You're producing a ton of content or you're just like button pushers at this point in time.
So you need to frame it in a way where like you're telling them that we're going to drive this amount of organic traffic in 12 months.
If you went out and paid for the traffic, this is what you would spend.
This is how the competitors are doing.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Live training on account growth review and strategy application.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Conversion is the new focus.** With traffic growth plateauing, the priority is now converting existing visitors. This requires adding CTAs and internal links to high-traffic blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [**Attribution is key to proving ROI.** Standard last-touch attribution undercredits content's influence. GA4 path explorations are needed to show how organic content contributes to the full conversion journey.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
  - [**Frame value against competitors.** To secure executive buy-in, show how the client's organic traffic value compares to competitors' paid spend, or highlight their lead in capturing a specific keyword category.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [**Augment provides a playbook for success.** Its strategy of targeted refreshes, a site redesign, and a product-led content pivot drove weekly traffic from 7k to 36k and paid signups from 14 to 69.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=3189.0)

## Topics

### The Challenge: High Traffic, Low Conversions

  - [**Engine:** High engagement (\~76%) but low conversion (0.02% blog, 0.79% site-wide).](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** Add CTAs and internal links to high-traffic posts to direct users to product pages.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [**Proposed Test:** A/B test CTAs on a few related pages before a mass refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [**AIMBit:** Session growth is not translating to conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
      - [**Problem:** Content is not built for conversion (e.g., "wall of text" pages with no CTAs).](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
      - **Data Discrepancy:** A Looker dashboard showed low engagement (\<40%) for clusters, while a top-pages view showed higher rates.
          - [**Cause:** The dashboard used a blended rate over a long period, obscuring recent positive trends.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
          - [**Solution:** Change the Looker dimension to `ISO year week` to see weekly trends.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
  - [**Airbyte:** Consistent low engagement across all clusters, despite strong traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=2326.0)
      - [**Problem:** Content format (e.g., "wall of text") may be the primary issue.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
      - [**Next Step:** Use an experimentation mindset.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=2793.0)
          - [**Prioritize:** Use GSC data (queries, rankings) to find low-hanging fruit (high-volume, low-difficulty keywords).](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=2820.0)
          - [**Enrich:** Focus on improving a few high-potential pages rather than a mass refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=2793.0)
          - [**Research:** Conduct sessions with Airbyte solution engineers to understand the target audience (AI/software engineers).](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)

### The Solution: Proving Value & Driving Conversions

  - [**Attribution:**](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
      - [**Problem:** Standard last-touch attribution undercredits organic content's influence.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
      - [**Solution:** Use GA4 path explorations to show how organic content is a touchpoint in the full conversion journey.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
  - [**Executive Buy-in:**](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
      - [**Problem:** Securing buy-in from stakeholders who don't see the day-to-day value.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
      - [**Solutions:**](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
          - [**Frame Value Against Competitors:** Show how the client's organic traffic value compares to competitors' paid spend.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
          - [**Highlight Keyword Capture:** Demonstrate progress by showing the client's share of total search volume in a key category.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
          - [**Improve Communication:** Ensure updates are clear for non-POCs, explicitly stating any client-side blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [**Augment: A Playbook for Success:**](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=3189.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Targeted refreshes, a site redesign with CTA components, and a product-led content pivot.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=3189.0)
      - [**Results:**](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=3390.0)
          - [Weekly traffic: 7k → 36k](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=3454.0)
          - [Weekly paid signups: 14 → 69](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=3390.0)
          - Keyword ownership: \~30 \#1 keywords for "code review tools"
      - [**Insight:** Liz's custom GPT, fed with Fathom data and meeting transcripts, identified a gap: the strategy excels at Bofu conversions but underperforms on the client's long-term vision of being the informational hub for mid-to-senior devs.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=3547.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
      - [Propose an A/B test for CTAs on Engine's high-traffic blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
      - [Implement GA4 path explorations to better attribute content value for Engine and VisCom.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
      - [Frame VisCom's value against competitors to secure executive buy-in.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
      - [Change the AIMBit Looker dimension to `ISO year week` to analyze recent trends.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
      - [Send the AIMBit analysis to Kyle for review.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=3850.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=2310.0)
      - [Use GSC data to prioritize Airbyte pages for enrichment based on search volume and difficulty.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=2820.0)
      - [Schedule sessions with Airbyte solution engineers to gather audience insights.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)
  - [**Liz:**](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=3036.0)
      - [Share the Python script for pulling Fathom data with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=3651.0)
  - [**Andi:**](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=3808.0)
      - [Plan the next training session for Bailey, Katya, and Matt.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=3808.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
      - [Help Carrie change the AIMBit Looker dimension to `ISO year week`.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
      - [Review Carrie's AIMBit analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=3850.0)
  - [**Talal:**](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
      - [Share the GA4 path exploration template for measuring organic content's journey influence.](https://fathom.video/share/iTASRs_mQduFW2o9ithvqA9DzCBeHoeE?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
